ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the conversation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the conversation */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being discussed */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the conversation */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the transcript */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the conversation (e.g., call center, chatbot, email) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Communication channel (e.g., phone, web, email) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the conversation */,
  "participant_ids" TEXT /* IDs of participants involved in the conversation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created or uploaded the conversation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversation was created or uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., customer service, product feedback) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for easy visualization in reports */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the sentiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversation_sentiments" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment expressed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score of the sentiment expressed (e.g., 0.8 for 80% positive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the sentiment entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id", "sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversation_sentiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
